text: This section explains which unmanned rocket operations are governed by Subpart C.
This section defines Class 1 Model Rockets, Class 2 High-Power Rockets, and Class 3 Advanced High-Power Rockets.
This section establishes general requirements for amateur rocket operations, including suborbital flight, unmanned operation, and avoiding hazards to people, property, and aircraft.

section_title: Operating limitations for Class 2 and Class 3 rockets
text: This section establishes weather, visibility, cloud, airport-distance, controlled-airspace, safety-distance, adult-supervision, and fire-safety requirements for Class 2 and Class 3 rockets.
This section explains when operators of rockets other than Class 1 Model Rockets must notify the nearest FAA air traffic control facility and what information must be provided.
This section lists the information required when Class 2 or Class 3 rocket operations require a certificate of waiver or authorization.
